pr.title: Record: Aggressive SGD TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.1124)

output.summary: Aggressively fine-tunes all weights on validation data via high-LR, long SGD TTT after base training, then quantizes and sliding-window evaluates.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT phase trains via SGD on the validation shard before sliding-window evaluation.
techniques: High-LR, 30-epoch SGD TTT with all blocks unfrozen
Int6+zstd quant roundtrip ahead of sliding eval
